quiz.exitDialogContent: Your current progress will be lost.

purchase.unlockDescription:
Upgrade to Premium to play
without limits

stageDescription.shopping_quiz1: Add 2 waters to the cart and purchase on the e-commerce site
stageDescription.shopping_quiz2: Complete 3 steps: address, payment method, and order confirmation
stageDescription.shopping_quiz3: Reorder the most recently purchased item from order history
stageDescription.shopping_quiz4: Select the total amount of items in the cart from 4 choices
stageDescription.chat_quiz1: Reply with one sticker in the chat app
stageDescription.chat_quiz2: React to the other person's message with a heart
stageDescription.chat_quiz3: Send one photo in the chat app
stageDescription.streaming_quiz1: Turn on the subtitle feature in the video app
stageDescription.streaming_quiz2: Go to the next video and skip to the middle
stageDescription.streaming_quiz3: Play a video at 2x speed in the video app
stageDescription.streaming_quiz4: Change to highest quality and download the video
stageDescription.map_quiz1: Show your current location in the map app
stageDescription.map_quiz2: Tap the school icon on the map to show its information
stageDescription.map_quiz3: Select the park and choose train to navigate in the map app
stageDescription.map_quiz4: Tap the station on the map and save it to favorites in the map app
stageDescription.alarm_quiz1: Add a new alarm in the clock app
stageDescription.alarm_quiz2: Set an alarm to repeat only Monday through Friday
stageDescription.alarm_quiz3: Turn off the snooze feature and save
stageDescription.alarm_quiz4: Delete the top alarm from the alarm list
stageDescription.payment_quiz1: Show the QR code in the payment app
stageDescription.payment_quiz2: Tap the eye icon to hide your balance in the payment app
stageDescription.payment_quiz3: Send money to someone in the payment app
stageDescription.payment_quiz4: Change the payment method to a credit card and show the QR code in the payment app
stageDescription.mail_quiz1: Archive the 3rd email from the top in the mail app
stageDescription.mail_quiz2: Empty the trash folder in the mail app
stageDescription.mail_quiz3: Select 3 emails and delete them in the mail app
stageDescription.mail_quiz4: Search for emails larger than 5 megabytes in the mail app
stageDescription.news_quiz1: Pull down to refresh the news feed
stageDescription.news_quiz2: Swipe or tap the tab to show Sports
stageDescription.news_quiz3: Open an article and change the font size to Large
stageDescription.news_quiz4: Hide the movie review article from the menu
stageDescription.calendar_quiz1: Use the calendar to check the events for next month
stageDescription.calendar_quiz2: Add a new event on the 15th
stageDescription.calendar_quiz3: Move the dentist appointment to the next day
stageDescription.calendar_quiz4: After navigating years ahead, return to today's date
stageDescription.sns_quiz1: Double tap the cat photo to like it
stageDescription.sns_quiz2: Swipe down to close the fullscreen image
stageDescription.sns_quiz3: Scroll back to the top of the timeline instantly
stageDescription.sns_quiz4: Long press the profile icon to switch to your sub account

tip.defaultContent: Sharpen your UI/UX intuition by solving quizzes!

tutorial.step3: I worked hard on them, so give them a try!
tutorial.step4: Let's start with the shopping app. Here we go!
tutorial.step5: Whoa! The text has become unreadable!
tutorial.step6: Maybe my curse spread to it...
tutorial.step7: But don't worry! Even without reading the text, icons and colors should give you a "feeling". Give it a try!

data.title: Data & Account
data.resetDataDialogMessage:
All your learning will vanish…🥺
All clear records and play history will be deleted.

support.title: Support the Developer
support.description:
Thank you for supporting NantoNack!
Your support will be used to improve the app and keep it running.
※No special features are unlocked by this.
support.thankYouMessage: Your coffee will fuel more improvements to the app!
support.restoreError: Failed to restore purchases. Please try again.
support.noOfferings: No plans available at the moment.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.defaultMessage:
We are currently under maintenance.
Please try again later.

update.title: Update Available
update.forceMessage: Please update the app to continue using it.
update.optionalMessage: A new version is available. We recommend updating.
